phase_history.key_outcome: CR scoped: new UpstashStateStore adapter (HTTP REST, upstash-redis) as an alternate seen-state backend selected by UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL+TOKEN env presence, else falls back to JsonFileStateStore. No StateStore Protocol change.
8 ACs (V3-003-001..008), 5 BRs, 2 INT, 3 ADDED requirements (new upstash-state capability). openspec validate --strict PASS.

4 ADRs, 0 endpoints (CLI/no-API), 7 tasks (analyst); openspec validate PASS. Adapter implements is_seen(HGET)/mark_seen(HSETNX)+load/save; _build_store env selection; SeenTracker Protocol widening; fail-loud StateError.

phase_history.note: 7/7 tasks, 39 new tests, 96% coverage, 0 lint errors. UpstashStateStore + SeenTracker Protocol + _build_store env selection. 0 deviations from design.
GO — 0 bugs. All 8 ACs verified; HSETNX confirmed; StateError propagation confirmed all 4 sites; no str(exc); StateStore unchanged. 658/658 pass, 96.17% coverage.
v0.13.0 released. CHANGELOG+version bumped, workflow updated with Upstash env vars, commit 4d00080 pushed to master, change archived as 2026-07-11-v3-upstash-state.

active_concerns: R-1: pipeline calls is_seen/mark_seen (concrete helpers), NOT just load/save Protocol — Upstash adapter MUST implement both with identical semantics or it AttributeErrors at runtime
R-4/AC-007: env-vars-set => Upstash is authoritative => runtime failure is FATAL (StateError), never a silent local fallback; fallback is construction-time-on-absence ONLY
AC-003: write-once first_seen_at via HSETNX (set-if-absent), no read-modify-write race
R-3: REST URL/token are bearer secrets — never log/error/commit them
R-2: _partition_new/_collect_all type hints are pinned to JsonFileStateStore — widen to a shared seen-tracker type

terminology.UpstashStateStore: state backend persisting seen-items in Upstash Redis over HTTP REST (upstash-redis client)
terminology.backend selection: env-driven choice at construction: both UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL+TOKEN present => Upstash, else JsonFileStateStore
terminology.fail loud: runtime Upstash error => StateError (exit 1), never a silent fallback/empty-state — because state is the idempotency source of truth
